title: huggingface/transformers
summary: Hugging Face Transformers 是一个领先的机器学习框架，支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的定义、推理和训练。它集成了大量预训练模型（如 BERT、GPT、DeepSeek、Gemma、Qwen 等），并提供统一的 API 和模型中心。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有超过 16 万星标，是 NLP 和 AI 领域最受欢迎的开源项目之一，广泛应用于研究和工业界。
summary_en: Hugging Face Transformers is a leading machine learning framework for defining, inferring, and training state-of-the-art models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal domains. It integrates a vast collection of pretrained models (e.g., BERT, GPT, DeepSeek, Gemma, Qwen) and provides a unified API and model hub. With over 162k stars on GitHub, it is one of the most popular open-source projects in NLP and AI, widely used in research and industry.
